title: Miriskin
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Substance |image= |name=Miriskin |locations= |date= |discovered= |creators= |created= |type= |color= |properties= |uses=Allegedly inhibited [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' |cost= }} {{Quote|She wasn't supposed to be able—They said it would make a Jedi powerless.''"
"''What are you talking about?''"
"''The miriskin.|[[Chalco]] and [[Daeshara'cor]]|}} '''Miriskin''' was a piece of cloth that was worn around the neck. It was made from the skin of an [[Ysalamiri/Legends|ysalamir]] and was claimed to be able to stop a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] from using their powers on the being who wore it. The miriskin was, of course, a hoax made to dupe the gullible out of their cash, since only living ysalamiri could push back [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Many examples of miriskin were not even made from the creatures themselves. {{Substance-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Materials and textiles]]
